title: 🤑 How to Apply for PM Mudra Loan Online in 2026: A Step-by-Step Guide 📈
metaTitle: PM Mudra Loan Online Application 2026 | Eligibility, Documents, Interest Rate
metaDescription: Learn how to apply for PM Mudra Loan online in 2026. Get information on eligibility, required documents, interest rates, and the application process 🏦
tableOfContents: Eligibility Criteria for PM Mudra Loan
Documents Required for PM Mudra Loan

intro.heading: 🌟 Introduction to PM Mudra Loan 🌟
intro.content: The PM Mudra Loan is a government-backed scheme that provides financial assistance to small businesses, entrepreneurs, and individuals in India 🇮🇳. The loan is designed to promote entrepreneurship, job creation, and economic growth 📈. In this article, we will guide you through the process of applying for a PM Mudra Loan online in 2026 📊.

sections.heading: 📝 Eligibility Criteria for PM Mudra Loan 📝
sections.content: To be eligible for a PM Mudra Loan, you must meet the following criteria: you should be an Indian citizen 🇮🇳, your business should be registered and operational in India 🏢, and you should have a good credit score 📊. Additionally, the loan is categorized into three types: Shishu (up to ₹50,000), Kishor (₹50,001 to ₹5 lakh), and Tarun (₹5 lakh to ₹10 lakh) 🤑.

sections.heading: 📁 Documents Required for PM Mudra Loan 📁
sections.content: To apply for a PM Mudra Loan, you will need to provide the following documents: identity proof (Aadhaar card, PAN card, etc.) 📝, address proof (passport, driving license, etc.) 📍, business registration documents (GST certificate, shop act, etc.) 📈, and bank statements (last 6 months) 📊. You may also need to provide additional documents, such as income tax returns and balance sheets, depending on the loan amount and type 📊.

sections.heading: 📊 Interest Rates and Repayment Terms 📊
sections.content: The interest rates for PM Mudra Loan vary depending on the lender and the loan amount 📈. The interest rates range from 8.5% to 12.5% per annum 📊. The repayment term for the loan is typically 5-7 years 📆. You can repay the loan in monthly installments, which will include the principal amount and the interest 📊.

sections.heading: 📈 Step-by-Step Online Application Process 📈
sections.content: To apply for a PM Mudra Loan online, follow these steps: visit the official website of the lender or the government portal 🌐, fill out the online application form with your personal and business details 📝, upload the required documents 📁, and submit the application 📊. You will receive a confirmation message and a reference number after submitting the application 📝. The lender will then verify your application and sanction the loan amount 🏦. You can track the status of your application online or through the lender's customer care 📞.

faqs.q: What is the maximum loan amount that can be borrowed under the PM Mudra Loan scheme? 🤔
faqs.a: The maximum loan amount that can be borrowed under the PM Mudra Loan scheme is ₹10 lakh 🤑.

faqs.q: What is the interest rate for the PM Mudra Loan? 📊
faqs.a: The interest rate for the PM Mudra Loan varies depending on the lender and the loan amount, but it typically ranges from 8.5% to 12.5% per annum 📊.

faqs.q: How long does it take to process the PM Mudra Loan application? 🕒
faqs.a: The processing time for the PM Mudra Loan application varies depending on the lender and the complexity of the application, but it typically takes 7-10 working days 📆.
